'''garama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huapango|huapango]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-r-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huapango|huapango]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| garama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæræmæth|gæræmæth]] || [[word:gæræmæj|gæræmæj]] || [[word:gæræmæsh|gæræmæsh]] || [[word:gæræmæ|gæræmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gararamath|gararamath]] || [[word:gararamaj|gararamaj]] || [[word:gararamash|gararamash]] || [[word:gararama|gararama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:garamath|garamath]] || [[word:garamaj|garamaj]] || [[word:garamash|garamash]] || [[word:garama|garama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:garafmath|garafmath]] || [[word:garafmaj|garafmaj]] || [[word:garafmash|garafmash]] || [[word:garafmaf|garafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:garamatha|garamatha]] || [[word:garamaja|garamaja]] || [[word:garamasha|garamasha]] || [[word:garamaka|garamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:garamath|garamath]] || [[word:garamaj|garamaj]] || [[word:garamash|garamash]] || [[word:garama|garama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:garamathal|garamathal]] || [[word:garamajal|garamajal]] || [[word:garamashal|garamashal]] || [[word:garamakal|garamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:garamathatha|garamathatha]] || [[word:garamajaja|garamajaja]] || [[word:garamashasha|garamashasha]] || [[word:garamaka|garamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:garamathan|garamathan]] || [[word:garamajan|garamajan]] || [[word:garamashan|garamashan]] || [[word:garamakan|garamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:garamathaoro|garamathaoro]] || [[word:garamajaoro|garamajaoro]] || [[word:garamashaoro|garamashaoro]] || [[word:garamakaoro|garamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
